name: Zaheer Ahmed
title: Full Stack Developer
about: I am a dedicated Full-Stack Developer, passionate about architecting scalable and modern web ecosystems.
My technical expertise spans across Next.js, React, Node.js, and modern databases like MongoDB and PostgreSQL, enabling me to build seamless end-to-end solutions.
I thrive on writing clean, maintainable code, optimizing performance bottlenecks, and collaborating with cross-functional teams to bring innovative ideas to life.
